steps.title: Identify the explanation
steps.content: The first clause says goats are notoriously indiscriminate in their diets. The next clause explains what that means: they devour all kinds of shrubs and weeds and leave virtually no part of any plant unconsumed.

steps.title: Use explanatory punctuation
steps.content: Choice A uses and without a comma to join independent clauses. Choice B uses only a comma, creating a comma splice. Choice C leaves two independent clauses with no punctuation. A colon correctly introduces the second clause as an explanation of indiscriminate. The answer is D.
